sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23525" key="dasu/prwktos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δᾰσῠ´-πρωκτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n23525.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rough-bottomed,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0497.tlg001:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pl.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
